description: The canonical CaptureAutoSave type in workflows.ts line 68-73 takes CaptureDeps as its parameter. CaptureDeps (ports.ts lines 23-28) contains clockNow, allocateNoteId, clipboardWrite, publish. The implementation at pipeline.ts line 55 uses CaptureAutoSavePorts, a completely different type with 12 fields including noteIsEmpty, getCurrentNote, getPreviousFrontmatter, writeFileAtomic, vaultPath, refreshSort, applyTagDelta, beginAutoSave, onSaveSucceeded, onSaveFailed. This is not a superset -- it is a different interface altogether. REQ-017 explicitly requires conformance to 'the type signature: (deps: CaptureDeps) => (state: EditingState, trigger) => Promise<Result<NoteFileSaved, SaveError>>'.
